title: Coinbase USDC Revenue Growth Forecast
text: Bloomberg Intelligence analysts estimate Coinbase's income from USDC could increase two to seven times if adoption continues to rise, representing potential 2-7x multiplier on current revenue streams. USDC-related revenue already comprises substantial portion of Coinbase's business at 19% of total income in 2025, demonstrating stablecoin's growing importance. Expansion opportunity stems from increased USDC utilization beyond trading, specifically in payment transactions, remittances, and merchant services. Stablecoin transactions reached $33 trillion in 2025, with USDC representing over $18 trillion of total. Coinbase would benefit from transaction fees and interest on USDC reserves, a high-margin and stable source of income compared with traditional trading fees. Future legislation, including CLARITY Act, could impose restrictions on how exchanges earn from stablecoins, potentially affecting revenue growth trajectory despite CEO Brian Armstrong's confidence in adapting company's model.
